# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security


resources:
- name: vpc-network
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: true
    routingConfig:
      asymmetricRouting: false
      outputBasedRouting: true
    firewallRules:
    - targetTags:
        - allow-http
        - allow-https
      allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - start: 80
            end: 80
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - start: 443
            end: 443

- name: app-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    network: $(ref. vpc-network.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.0.0/24

- name: db-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    network: $(ref. vpc-network.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.1.0/24

- name: web-server
  type: container.v1.service
  properties:
    containers:
      - name: web-server
        image: gcr.io/[PROJECT_ID]/web-server
        ports:
          - containerPort: 80
            protocol: TCP
        env:
          - name: DB_HOST
            value: $(ref. db-service.selfLink)
          - name: DB_PORT
            value: '5432'
    template:
      metadata:
        labels:
          app: web-server

- name: db-service
  type: container.v1.service
  properties:
    containers:
      - name: db-service
        image: gcr.io/[PROJECT_ID]/db-service
        ports:
          - containerPort: 5432
            protocol: TCP
        env:
          - name: DB_HOST
            value: $(ref. db-service.selfLink)
          - name: DB_PORT
            value: '5432'
    template:
      metadata:
        labels:
          app: db-service

- name: db-server
  type: container.v1.service
  properties:
    containers:
      - name: db-server
        image: gcr.io/[PROJECT_ID]/db-server
        ports:
          - containerPort: 5432
            protocol: TCP
        env:
          - name: DB_HOST
            value: $(ref. db-service.selfLink)
          - name: DB_PORT
            value: '5432'
    template:
      metadata:
        labels:
          app: db-server

- name: firewall-rule-web
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref. vpc-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges:
      - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - start: 80
            end: 80

- name: firewall-rule-db
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref. vpc-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges:
      - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - start: 5432
            end: 5432

- name: firewall-rule-web-db
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref. vpc-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges:
      - 10.0.0.0/24
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - start: 80
            end: 80

- name: firewall-rule-db-web
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref. vpc-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges:
      - 10.0.1.0/24
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - start: 5432
            end: 5432

- name: firewall-rule-web-db
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref. vpc-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges:
      - 10.0.0.0/24
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - start: 5432
            end: 5432

- name: firewall-rule-db-web

        ports:
          - start: 80
            end: 80

            end: 5432

- name: firewall-rule-web-db
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref. vpc-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges:
      - 10.0.0.0/24
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - start: 5432
            end: 5432

- name: firewall-rule-db-web
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref. vpc-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges:
      - 10.0.1.0/24
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - start: 80
            end: 80

- name: firewall-rule-web-db
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref. vpc-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges:
      - 10.0.0.0/24
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - start: 80
            end: 80

- name: firewall-rule-db-web
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref. vpc-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges:
      - 10.0.1.0/24
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - start: 5432
            end: 5432

- name: firewall-rule-web-db
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref. vpc-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges:
      - 10.0.0.0/24
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - start: 5432
            end: 5432

  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:

      - 10.0.0.0/24
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
